recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Population 436
recommendations.overview: A census-taker is sent to investigate why a certain small town has had the same population -- 436 residents -- for the last 100 years.

recommendations.title: Birdemic: Shock and Terror
recommendations.overview: A platoon of eagles and vultures attacks the residents of a small town. Many people die. It's not known what caused the flying menace to attack. Two people manage to fight back, but will they survive Birdemic?

recommendations.title: 2001 Maniacs
recommendations.overview: On their way to Spring Break, college kids take a detour through an old Southern town. The people of Pleasant Valley insist the kids stay for their annual barbecue celebration... but instead of getting a taste of the old South, the old South gets a t

recommendations.title: 30 Days of Night
recommendations.overview: This is the story of an isolated Alaskan town that is plunged into darkness for a month each year when the sun sinks below the horizon. As the last rays of light fade, the town is attacked by a bloodthirsty gang of vampires bent on an uninterrupted o

recommendations.title: His House
recommendations.overview: After making a harrowing escape from war-torn South Sudan, a young refugee couple struggle to adjust to their new life in a small English town that has an unspeakable evil lurking beneath the surface.

recommendations.title: The Fog
recommendations.overview: Trapped within an eerie mist, the residents of Antonio Bay have become the unwitting victims of a horrifying vengeance. One hundred years earlier, a ship carrying lepers was purposely lured onto the rocky coastline and sank, drowning all aboard. Now

recommendations.title: The Wailer
recommendations.overview: On their way to Mexico, six students are stranded in a small town where years before a tragedy took place.

recommendations.title: In for a Murder
recommendations.overview: A stay-at-home mom and avid reader of crime stories discovers the deepest secrets of a small town's residents while investigating a woman's murder.

recommendations.title: Halloween
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween Night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield, Illinois to kill again.
